instruction: Phase 6 Deployment and Optimization: 1) Create Dockerfile in workspace/backend for containerized deployment. 2) Create docker-compose.yml in workspace/ for full-stack orchestration. 3) Create .env.example files with all required environment variables. 4) Create nginx.conf for reverse proxy configuration. 5) Create .dockerignore files. 6) Add build scripts to package.json for frontend production build.
